recentTweets.text:
Medicare Advantage patients & their providers often have to call health insurance companies multiple times or FAX documents to get common treatments approved. 
 
My bipartisan bill would modernize this antiquated process & cut the 
administrative red tape seniors & their families https://t.co/46x5wrBxOh

Today we remember my dear friend, the incredible John Lewis.  
 
He fought tirelessly for equality, justice, & the right to vote.  
 
Let’s continue to make “Good Trouble” & honor his legacy. https://t.co/xggCx9O17s

Trump keeps coming up with new corrupt ways to profit off the presidency.  

His Truth Social company is now going to allow Wall Street to buy early access to president’s social media posts. It’s all about pay to play with this administration. 

https://t.co/sATwT9lDZI

Vote-by-mail is safe, secure, & convenient. Washington voters have mailed in their ballots for years with no credible evidence of widespread fraud. 

Trump is still trying to undermine faith in our elections—particularly when he doesn’t like the outcome.
Senate Republicans just voted to continue Trump's harmful AI Medicare experiment that delays & denies care, and has left seniors in WA & other pilot states suffering in pain for weeks.

The Justice Department will never be independent with Trump’s personal lawyer as attorney general. 

Todd Blanche’s slip up says it all. https://t.co/bHqt9RuKnJ

Americans across the country are getting sick from the Cyclospora, which can cause severe GI distress.  
 
Monitoring can help us track & stop the spread, but did you know the Trump administration cut the program to monitor & track this parasite?  
 
This outbreak is just the

Great news! My bill with @repmikekelly to cut health insurance red tape for seniors & get them the care they need faster unanimously passed the Ways & Means Committee with overwhelming bipartisan support today. 
 
It’s time to get it on the floor for a vote now! https://t.co/cv3rtt6Shm

House Republicans just released their latest budget plan that would add another $95 billion to the national debt to fund an unpopular war that is driving up costs here at home.  

It will also block millions of Americans from voting. I’ll do everything I can to stop this terrible

Struggling to afford groceries? The Vice President has a solution for you. Install a luxury $120,000 chicken coop so you can gather your own eggs. 
 
Families are looking for real solutions to address the high cost of groceries, not more home renovations from the Trump

Trump’s war with Iran continues to squeeze families.  
 
Washingtonians have paid over $973 million more for gas since the war began. https://t.co/ODZ3YtZdOF

Republicans’ Big Ugly Bill sent insurance premiums skyrocketing & 40,000 Washingtonians had to drop their coverage this year because it became so expensive.  

Insurance premiums could go up by another 22 percent next year, squeezing families even more.  
 
We need real solutions

Another tragedy caused by ICE.  

In just a week, immigration agents have killed two people in our communities. The agents were not wearing body cameras.

We need a full investigation so the families can get answers & Congress must pass reforms to stop this senseless violence.
Joined Cepheid in Bothell to discuss innovation in health care & the impact of tariffs on manufacturing medical technology in WA. https://t.co/ivBhzbPZOo

Trump launched a bogus lawsuit with his own IRS to get immunity from tax audits.  

A federal judge today saw through this scheme & barred the protections for the president & his family.  

We must continue protecting the American people from this administration’s blatant

Interested in learning how Congress works & making a difference in your community? Apply for a Fall 2026 internship in my Bellevue or D.C. office.  
 
To learn more, visit: https://t.co/AaiPgKZUCa https://t.co/7XwjaeIaQp

Families are struggling to keep a roof over their heads & Congress passed an overwhelmingly bipartisan bill to help address the rising costs of housing & build more homes. 
 
Trump refused to sign this bill he once championed. It became law today 
regardless of his inaction, but

Celebrated the opening of the 737 North Line in Everett!  
 
WA is home to the best aerospace workforce in the world & this new production line is an investment in ensuring the world continues to fly on wings built in the PNW. https://t.co/o3filW5CvO
Trump continues to take absolutely zero responsibility for the affordability crisis he created & continues to worsen. https://t.co/Mq4WWR8cwz

I secured $741,000 in federal funding for Bothell to acquire a much-needed backup generator for their Emergency Coordination Center.  
 
Great to join them for the ribbon cutting today! This generator will help 
make Bothell & surrounding communities safer & improve response https://t.co/FpqVYpzRFh

Trump’s reckless policies have made gas, groceries, health care, & utilities more expensive. 
 
According to a new report, WA families have already been forced to spend $3,600 more this year. https://t.co/2g6SdAApZI

Republicans’ Big Ugly Bill makes college even more unaffordable for current & prospective students, while raising student loan payments for millions of graduates.  
 
To see if you’re impacted by these changes, visit: https://t.co/FmMapXTnmS

Looking forward to cheering on @USMNT today when they take on Belgium in Seattle⚽⚽⚽ 

Let’s go USA! https://t.co/UIO6M7BTp5
For America’s 250th birthday, we asked you to share why you’re excited to celebrate. https://t.co/qkHHM3Nv9Q
Great to celebrate America’s 250th birthday at the Bothell Fire Department’s annual July 4th pancake breakfast. https://t.co/4eh1W976YF
Happy 4th of July! 🎆🇺🇸🎆 https://t.co/EgVN1jPyOY
Republicans’ Big Ugly Bill was first & foremost a massive tax break for the wealthy & well-connected  that is expected to balloon our national debt by over $4 trillion. https://t.co/rcKZwMfjyk
Last year, Republicans made historic cuts to programs that help families put food on the table & as a result over 34,000 Washingtonians have lost access to food assistance. https://t.co/wsTyEx9Rv6

Republicans only care about waste, fraud, & abuse when they are cutting programs for everyday families.  
 
But they’re happy to turn a blind eye for the for the well-off. They cut billions in investments that help the IRS go after wealthy people who dodge paying taxes they owe. https://t.co/0LDaMQJ7PV
Congrats to the @USMNT! The 12s are ready to welcome you back to Seattle for the Round of 16 ⚽️🇺🇸⚽️ https://t.co/0mJZPVfAUE
Great to welcome students from Kamiakin & Eisenhower middle schools to the Capitol with @RepRickLarsen during their visit to D.C.! https://t.co/G6A9FHF8Go

USMCA was the one major trade success from Trump’s first term. It was a real, enforceable trade agreement that addressed issues in NAFTA and supported American workers, manufacturers, and consumers. The deal was passed through Congress with bipartisan support and created a stable

Washington has particularly benefited from this agreement and is one of the states with the most to lose by withdrawing. Washington exported over $11 billion to Mexico and Canada last year. Our farmers, producers, and manufacturers need the predictability this agreement provides

There are ways to improve USMCA without ripping up the agreement. The decision to withdraw from it will harm our already war- and tariff-ravaged economy, threaten jobs, and increase costs on businesses and families. This is a gravely misguided step by the president.

Republicans are celebrating the anniversary of their Big Ugly Bill.  
 
Let’s be clear - This bill has only hurt working families & made life more expensive for Americans. https://t.co/fOLSPyHXre

Trump personally awarded a $500 million no-bid contract to build his gilded ballroom.   

Just like the president’s botched renovation of the reflecting pool, your tax dollars are funding these absurd vanity projects with no oversight or competition. 

https://t.co/iqzyg6HFdG

One year in & Americans are already seeing the devastating consequences of Republicans’ Big Ugly Bill.  
 
In just a year, thousands of Washingtonians have lost their health insurance & premiums are unaffordable.  
 
This law has done nothing but rip health care away from people https://t.co/8PPxqnuoeb
🚨🚨The Supreme Court blocked Trump’s blatantly unconstitutional attempt to take away birthright citizenship. If you’re born in the United States you’re a citizen.

It shouldn’t take a member of Congress to get routine health care approved.   
 
The Trump administration’s AI Medicare program delays & denies care, directly hurting WA seniors. https://t.co/L227hEctmQ

The Trump administration is finally acknowledging that their AI program delays & denies care for WA seniors.  
 
I won’t stop pushing for transparency & accountability.  

https://t.co/XV1gkKdldC

This SCOTUS ruling is a win for Washingtonians & millions of Americans across the country who rely on vote-by-mail as a safe, reliable way to cast their ballot.   

Glad this attempt to suppress voters was rejected.  

But with recent changes at the post office, it’s always

Need assistance with a federal agency? Team DelBene will be on site at the Snohomish Library holding mobile casework hours on July 6 from 10am to 2pm.  Learn more about casework services here: https://t.co/jcikCqKSPJ https://t.co/3pRDFWMDuT
Watergate was a black mark on our nation's history. The vice president trying to normalize corruption tells you all you need to know about this White House. https://t.co/RPfqJ1Plg9
Patients & doctors agree. The Trump administration’s AI experiment is damaging Medicare, delaying & denying care for patients, & creating more work for providers. https://t.co/G5QGqNVL7m

LGBTQ+ Americans deserve to feel safe & supported in their communities.  
 
That’s why I introduced a resolution to designate June 26 as Equality Day in honor of the progress we’ve made & the work still ahead. https://t.co/czpM3N2037

Trump & Republican priorities are completely out of touch with the needs of the American people. Congress passed a bipartisan proposal to lower housing costs, but the president is holding it hostage over his voter suppression bill. https://t.co/mnVxepD8LG
What if Trump just signs the extremely bipartisan housing bill? https://t.co/JeVrYlXhr2
Great news! The House Energy & Commerce Health Subcommittee unanimously approved my strongly bipartisan bill that will cut red tape & allow seniors to get the medical care they need when they need it

Trump continues to viciously attack voting by mail. For decades, Washington has run successful & secure vote-by-mail elections.

Every American should have access to this reliable way to vote. https://t.co/1ss9wqCtWG

We’re already starting to see the devastating effects of Republican cuts to food assistance.  Over 770,000 children have lost access to SNAP & are going hungry.   
 
This absolutely heartless policy is forcing kids to go hungry across the country.

Once again Trump makes it clear he could not care less about how expensive things are for everyday Americans.
  
While families struggle to afford rent, the president is throwing a temper tantrum & refusing to sign bipartisan legislation to help lower housing costs.

Four years ago, SCOTUS overturned Roe v. Wade, which left millions of women without abortion access & reproductive care.  

Since then, attacks on reproductive freedom have only intensified.
  
Antiabortion activists were never going to stop at Roe. We must continue the fight to
Team DelBene stopped by the Everett FIFA World Cup fan zone ⚽⚽⚽ We asked fans from around the world what it means to them for the PNW to host the tournament. https://t.co/huShWEAbfB

The House just passed a bill to jumpstart home construction across the country to help address high housing costs for families. 
 
I’m proud to have supported this bipartisan effort & will continue to be a strong advocate for affordable housing.

The Trump administration launched a harmful program that uses AI to delay & deny care for seniors. They claim the model is supposed to cut down on “waste,” but it’s hurting patients. That’s why I’m pressing for transparency & answers on the real impacts of this program. https://t.co/wkiih9AuVN

Trump’s failed economy is squeezing small businesses across the country. I’ve heard from folks firsthand in WA how tariffs & high fuel costs are impacting them.

https://t.co/fSF83kCxSe

Parents should have access to safe, affordable child care in their community. With the opening of the LWTech Early Learning Center, we’re making progress toward achieving that goal. https://t.co/6XTF80iLFC
Honored to join the Snohomish community at this year’s Juneteenth celebration. https://t.co/Ing6Ki9290
Wishing a Happy Father’s Day to all the amazing dads out there! https://t.co/oauxn8VeZy
